name: Claude 2
note: First broadly available Claude with a 100K-token context window and markedly stronger coding/math than Claude 1.3.

results.notes: 0-shot Python coding (Codex HumanEval), up from 56.0% on Claude 1.3
Grade-school math, up from 85.2% on Claude 1.3

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: released July 11, 2023 per Anthropic's own announcement. 100K context window, HumanEval 71.2%, and GSM8K 88.0% all confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of anthropic.com/news/claude-2. Pricing: at July 2023 launch Claude 2 was priced the same as Claude 1 ($11.02/$32.68 per M, confirmed via Anthropic's official July-2023 pricing PDF), but by the Nov-2023 official Anthropic pricing PDF and prompthub.us model card, Claude 2.0's price had dropped to $8.00/$24.00 per M tokens -- the record's $8/$24 figure is confirmed as accurate for this later, more commonly cited price point. No other changes made.
